query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers) as workers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `groups`) as groups_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers) as cost_centers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events) as attendance_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches) as payroll_batches_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_items) as payroll_items_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM worker_daily_finance) as daily_finance_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers) as workers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `groups`) as groups_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers) as cost_centers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events) as attendance_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches) as payroll_batches_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_items) as payroll_items_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM worker_daily_finance) as daily_finance_count;
